src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Defaul.general_idea: Update the copyright year range and project description in the file header.
src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Defaul.human_impl: Changed 'Teragrep Azure Eventhub Reader' to 'Teragrep syslog bridge for Microsoft Azure EventHub' and updated copyright to '2023-2025'.

src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Defaul.general_idea: Replace manual single-connection handling with a connection pool abstraction for better resource management.
src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Defaul.human_impl: Replaced `RelpConnection` field and manual connect/reconnect logic with `Pool<IManagedRelpConnection>` and `UnboundPool`.

src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Defaul.general_idea: Switch from the old `RelpConfig` to the new `RelpConnectionConfig` to align with library updates.
src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Defaul.human_impl: Changed constructor parameter from `RelpConfig` to `RelpConnectionConfig` and updated imports.

src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Defaul.general_idea: Introduce explicit SSL context configuration for secure connections.
src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Defaul.human_impl: Added `SSLContextSupplier` parameter to the constructor and passed it to `ManagedRelpConnectionWithMetricsFactory`.

src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Defaul.general_idea: Delegate metrics collection to the connection factory instead of managing counters and timers manually.
src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Defaul.human_impl: Removed `Counter` and `Timer` fields and their manual incrementing logic, relying on `ManagedRelpConnectionWithMetricsFactory`.

src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Defaul.general_idea: Simplify the `accept` method by delegating send and retry logic to the managed connection.
src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Defaul.human_impl: Replaced manual batch commit, retry loops, and reconnection logic with `connection.ensureSent(batch)`.

src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Defaul.general_idea: Change the `accept` method to take a `RelpBatch` instead of a raw byte array.
src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Defaul.human_impl: Changed method signature from `accept(byte[] syslogMessage)` to `accept(final RelpBatch batch)`.

src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Defaul.general_idea: Add a secondary constructor for dependency injection of the connection pool.
Remove the custom `toString` implementation as it is no longer needed or relevant.
Simplify the `close` method by removing manual disconnect logic.
src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Defaul.human_impl: Removed try-catch block for `relpConnection.disconnect()` (logic likely moved to pool management).

src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Main.j.human_impl: Added imports for PluginMap, MappedPluginFactories, and WrappedPluginFactoryWithConfig.

src/main/java/com/teragrep/aer_01/Main.j.general_idea: Integrate the rlp_01 library for RELP (Reliable Event Logging Protocol) connections.

Refactor the main method to initialize metrics, plugins, and connection pools explicitly.
